contents.value:
## `--offset`

This option is a Wic-specific option that says to place a partition at exactly the specified offset. If the partition cannot be placed at the specified offset, the image build will fail. Specify as an integer value optionally followed by one of the units "s"/"S" for 512 byte sector, "k"/"K" for kibibyte, "M" for mebibyte and "G" for gibibyte. The default unit if none is given is "k".
